description_long: This is a circular bracelet composed of round, polished beads in a rich purple hue with swirling white marbling, likely made from amethyst or a similar semi-precious stone. The beads are strung together on an elastic or flexible band, allowing the bracelet to stretch for easy wearing. One segment of the bracelet features a distinct, elongated cylindrical bead with intricate black and white geometric patterns, possibly made from metal or ceramic, serving as a decorative focal point. The surface of the beads is smooth and glossy, reflecting light softly. The overall design is simple yet elegant, with the patterned bead adding a touch of artistic flair. This bracelet would be suitable for casual or semi-formal urban wear, complementing a variety of outfits.
description: A circular bracelet of polished purple marbled beads with a single patterned cylindrical accent bead, combining simplicity with a touch of artistic detail.
description_view_0: The bracelet's front view highlights the patterned cylindrical bead and several adjacent purple marbled beads.
description_view_1: This angle shows mostly the purple marbled beads, with only a small portion of the patterned bead visible at the edge.
description_view_2: The patterned bead is centered and partially obscured, with the marbled beads forming a near-complete circle.
description_view_3: The patterned bead is visible from the side, with the marbled beads dominating the view.
